title: Cleaning Set On Blistercard 5pc
features: Great for kids imaginery creative play
Help kids learn important life skills like washing hands and tidying up through role playing games.
Let imaginations run wild and grow through play time with props to add that extra layer to play pretend fun
Add that real life element to play time with toys that look and feel like they could be the real thing!
description: Product Description Cleaning Set On Blistercard 5pc KandyToys Play and Learn clean up play set contains 4 child-sized cleaning props ideal for play pretend and roleplaying games. Show your little ones how to tidy up and clean through play time. The set includes: A dustpan, brush, broom with detachable handle, and pretend soap dispenser. Please note, the hand soap dispenser is a toy and does not contain or dispense soap. Suitable for ages 3+ Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.
